title: AI Brick-Built Figure
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a playful brick-built character scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a playful interlocking plastic brick-built scene. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit colors, and scene context. Recreate each subject as a brick-built minifigure-inspired character with blocky toy proportions, glossy plastic surfaces, visible brick seams, bright colors, and a polished toy-photography look.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, changed identity, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, unrelated objects, low quality, blurry, uncanny, over-smoothed skin
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. brick-built toy scene, glossy plastic...
